description:
Legal record (#25) in a court register/pinqas from a Rabbanite beit din in Cairo (on ff. 6v-7r of BL OR 6356). In Hebrew. Location: Cairo. Dated in the first third of Adar 5443 AM, which is 1683 CE. 

(Document #25) Purchase agreement for shares in multiple properties located in (or perhaps near) the Jewish quarter of Cairo. Following their receipt of an apartment and three shops as gifts from their deceased grandmother, Mira widow of Shelomo Rios sells her share in these properties to her brother Yiṣḥaq b. Yaʿaqov Ben-Alḥadab. Besides Mira and Yiṣḥaq, one other grandchild had received a gift-share in the properties: Yiṣḥaq b. Avraham Ben-Alḥadab. The trio's grandmother, Miryam the widow of Yiṣḥaq Ben-Alḥadab, had originally come to own the properties as part of her ketubba settlement. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
